svg.text: Streamlit + LangGraph (graph.invoke) + GPT-4o + Firebase + Google Drive + Google Sheets
( process_invoices path unused — no page calls it )
+ Add new category on the fly
No second graph.invoke — pure Streamlit phase
action = "generate_report" (Monthly Report page — straight through, no HITL)
Loads month + year invoices from Firestore
Writes Google Sheets tabs (month + year summary) · Moves sheet to Expenses folder → END
action = "chat" (Chat page — straight through, no HITL)
Loads all invoices + suppliers from Firestore (long-term memory)
GPT-4o-mini · chat_history last 20 turns (short-term) → agent_response → END
Injected into chat + anomaly context every run
Writes invoice table + summary + category + supplier tabs
Spreadsheet saved inside Expenses/ folder in Drive
All invoices + suppliers injected as context
delete_file — on HITL cancel or HITL 2 discard
Sheet1 removed after first real tab added
